6.response: {"Q0":"No, I only went for the gems of the planet which still had the astronaut. I even avoided the green ice as I couldn't be sure what type of gem (if any) it contained."}

11.response: {"Q0":"How people choose between risks, and how quickly they can respond in short timeframes."}

13.response: {"Q0":"I enjoyed the game a lot - thank you!"}

0.response: {"Q0":"I would tend to go for the galaxy with the higher chance of paying out, unless there was a decent enough discrepancy between the amounts in which case I was more likely to take a risk of less chance of payout, but higher reward."}

9.response: {"Q0":"I found the method of digging on the planets quite satisfying, so I preferred doing that to the galaxy choice."}

2.response: {"Q0":"I would guess around 40% of the time overall."}

8.response: {"Q0":"As explained previously, generally went with the higher chance, unless the risk/reward was decent enough."}

4.response: {"Q0":"Yes (those gems were now worthless and should not be earned)."}
